data.Modification: Iodoacetamide derivative/Addition of Glycine/Addition of G

project.title: Mapping phosphorylations on C-terminus of receptor
project.projectDescription: Characterization of interaction of a GPCR complex with beta-arrestin. The phosphorylation landscape of the receptor β2V2R's C-terminal is studied with LC-MS.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: In-gel digestion with trypsin, following extraction and analysis by Q-Exactive HF operating in postive mode. Samples were analyzed both in DDA mode and with PRM, targeting two petpides in both their nonphosphorylated and phosphorylated (1-4 phosphos) state.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Raw data was analyzed with MaxQuant to identify phosphopeptides and calculate localization probalities. PRM data was analyzed with Skyline.

labPIs.title: Dr
labPIs.affiliation: Proteomics Resource Center, The Rockefeller University, New York, 10065, NY, USA
labPIs.name: Henrik Molina

references.referenceLine: Nguyen AH, Thomsen ARB, Cahill TJ, Huang R, Huang LY, Marcink T, Clarke OB, Heissel S, Masoudi A, Ben-Hail D, Samaan F, Dandey VP, Tan YZ, Hong C, Mahoney JP, Triest S, Little J, Chen X, Sunahara R, Steyaert J, Molina H, Yu Z, des Georges A, Lefkowitz RJ. Structure of an endosomal signaling GPCR-G protein-β-arrestin megacomplex. Nat Struct Mol Biol. 2019 26(12):1123-1131

Characteristics[Specimen]: Gel-bands were cut into small pieces of approximately 1mm3 using a scalpel and destained, reduced and alkylated as previously described.
Characteristics[CellLine]: Sf9 cells were co-expressed with T4L-β2V2R, untagged bovine βarr1 (1–393), and GRK2-CAAX.
Characteristics[CleavageAgent]: sequencing grade trypsin (Promega) and endopeptidase LysC (Wako Chemicals)
Characteristics[AlkylationReagent]: Carbamidomethylation of C was applied as a static modification.
Comment[Instrument]: Peptides were analyzed using a Q-Exactive HF mass spectrometer (Thermo Scientific) operating in positive ion mode.
Comment[Separation]: Liquid chromatography was performed on a Dionex 3000 Ultimate HPLC equipped with a NCS3500RS nano- and microflow pump (Dionex).
Comment[GradientTime]: Solvent B went from 1% – 38% over 70 minutes followed by a sharp 1-minute increase to 90% where it was kept for 13 minutes.
